name: Banana Spice Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Taste of Home magazine
In a mixing bowl, cream the shortening and brown sugar. Add the eggs and bananas; mix well. Combine the dry ingredients; add to the creamed mixture and mix thoroughly. Stir in the nuts and raisins. Chill (the dough will be very soft). Drop rounded teaspoonfuls onto greased baking sheets. Bake at 350 degrees for 8-10 minutes or until lightly browned.
